raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the cup area; there is free table space to the right of the cup so it can be displaced without colliding with box_2 or table edges, clearing the approach corridor to box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is shifted to the right on the tabletop, increasing free space in front of and adjacent to box_2/box_1 for safer box grasping."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup no longer interferes with the left arm's approach; the left arm has access to the left side of box_2 to apply steadying force without pushing the attached boxes across the table.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is constrained against motion, reducing the risk of sliding/torque while box_1 is being separated and lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "There is sufficient clearance around the sides of box_1 for two-arm clamping contact; box_2 is stabilized to counteract the attachment between box_1 and box_2; no fragile objects are within the sweep volume of the arms.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by both arms and lifted free of the tabletop (and separated/controlled despite being attached to box_2)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the cup area; there is free table space to the right of the cup so it can be displaced without colliding with box_2 or table edges, clearing the approach corridor to box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is shifted to the right on the tabletop, increasing free space in front of and adjacent to box_2/box_1 for safer box grasping.

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup no longer interferes with the left arm's approach; the left arm has access to the left side of box_2 to apply steadying force without pushing the attached boxes across the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is constrained against motion, reducing the risk of sliding/torque while box_1 is being separated and lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: There is sufficient clearance around the sides of box_1 for two-arm clamping contact; box_2 is stabilized to counteract the attachment between box_1 and box_2; no fragile objects are within the sweep volume of the arms.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by both arms and lifted free of the tabletop (and separated/controlled despite being attached to box_2).
